sobre.p1: I am Dr. Henrique Cavalcante, a criminal and business attorney with over 15 years dedicated to defending individuals and companies in São Paulo courts and the Superior Court of Justice.
sobre.p2: My work begins long before the hearing — in the careful analysis of each case detail, in building a solid thesis and anticipating each move by the opposing side. Results are not luck. It's preparation.
sobre.photoAlt: Dr. Henrique Cavalcante in his office
diferenciais: Personalized and confidential service at every stage
Legal strategy built based on the details of your case
Clear and transparent communication — no legal jargon
Active presence in São Paulo courts and higher courts

associacoes.nome: Institute of Lawyers of São Paulo

items.texto: Dr. Henrique acted with precision and absolute discretion at an extremely sensitive time for our company. The result exceeded all our expectations and the case was resolved in record time.
Impeccable professionalism at every stage. In a case that seemed impossible to reverse, we achieved a favorable result thanks to the carefully constructed legal strategy.
It's rare to find a lawyer who combines deep technical knowledge with transparent communication. I know exactly what's happening in my case at every moment. I trust completely.
I was in a situation that seemed hopeless. Dr. Henrique analyzed every detail, presented a clear strategy and achieved a result no other firm had managed. My gratitude is immense.

The handling of our labor case was exemplary. Beyond the technical expertise, the team maintained constant and transparent communication. I recommend without hesitation to any company needing employer defense.

items.pergunta: How does the first consultation work?
items.resposta: The first consultation is confidential and serves to understand the details of your case. After the analysis, I present a clear strategy, estimated timeline and available options. You decide how to proceed without any prior commitment.

items.pergunta: How long does a criminal case take?
items.resposta: The duration varies according to the complexity of the case, the competent court and the court's workload. Simpler cases can be resolved in months; complex cases can take years. What I can guarantee is that I will act to accelerate as much as possible without compromising the quality of the defense.

items.pergunta: What is the difference between preventive and contentious law?
items.resposta: Preventive law acts before a conflict arises — contract review, compliance, business structuring — to avoid litigation. Contentious law acts when the conflict already exists, in judicial or administrative proceedings. Prevention is always more economical and efficient.

items.pergunta: Do you attend by video conference?
items.resposta: Yes. I serve clients from all over Brazil and abroad by video conference with the same quality as in-person service. For cases requiring presence in São Paulo courts, I am available to attend in person.

Fees are set on a case-by-case basis, according to complexity, estimated time and required resources. I work with fixed fees, hourly rates or success fees (in specific cases). Everything is discussed transparently before any engagement.
